name: AdvancedCLI
description: Zero-heap CLI engine for Arduino. Supports named args, flags, integers, floats, positional values, sub-commands, and aliases. Typed callbacks, built-in help output, validation hooks, and error handling - all backed by fixed-size buffers.
keywords: CLI, command, command line, serial, terminal, UART, argument, parser, commands, flags, sub-commands, aliases, help, validation, AVR, ESP32, Arduino, lightweight, embedded
